---
title: "Strategic Choices: How Tailored Information Influences Election Dynamics"
author: "Djouvas, C., Guinjoan, M., Ioannidis, N., Mendez, F., and Rodon, T."
date: 2024-01-01
description: "ECPR General Conference 2024"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
